scripts.build: npm run build -w @ttt-productions/edge-protocol-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/realtime-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/firebase-helpers && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/ui-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/theme-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/query-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/monitoring-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/media-schemas && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/chat-schemas && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/report-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/audit-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/notification-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/ttt-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/mobile-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/media-viewer && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/file-input && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/auth-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/upload-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/upload-ui && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/media-processing-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/chat-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/chat-react && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/rate-limit-core && npm run build -w @ttt-productions/moderation-core
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npx tsc -b --noEmit && npm run test
